name: Caribbean Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium flame until the mixture reaches a boil.
3. Reduce heat and let it simmer, stirring occasionally, until the mixture has reduced by half.
4. Turn off the heat and allow the sauce to cool.
5. Cover tightly and refrigerate.
6. Serve at room temperature.
